title: quadlet kube: consider empty pod as running
body:
Since commit 945aade38b we do tear down the kube units if all pods failed to start. This however broke the use case of an empty pod as we did not consider that being starting successfully which is wrong and caused a regression for at least one user.

To fix this special case the empty pod and consider that running.

Fixes: #25786
Fixes: 945aade38b ("quadlet kube: correctly mark unit as failed")
